displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #74: Rebels and Rogues, Part VII
synopsis: WOOKIEE VS. SITH! Our three stories converge as the rebels' plan to destroy the Empire's fleet come to a head! But can LUKE really trust the grifter WARBA CALIP? Can HAN, LEIA, and DAR CHAMPION survive a head-on battle with a STAR DESTROYER? And what happens when CHEWBACCA takes on LORD VADER himself in hand-to-hand combat? And the Rebellion's search for a new home…a base safe from the reach of the Empire…begins.
title: Star Wars (2015) #74: Rebels and Rogues, Part VII
